overview: Based on the published agenda, the Finance and Human Resources Committee of the Village of Weston was scheduled to meet on June 15, 2026, to acknowledge financial reports for May 2026, review departmental operations and budget matters, and consider amendments to personnel policies regarding clothing allowances and employee appearance standards. The meeting was set to address routine financial reporting and policy updates affecting village operations and employee benefits.

agenda.item: Approval of Minutes from Previous Finance & HR Meeting: May 18, 2026
TIF 1 and TIF 2 Detail Reports for May
Discussion on Finance Department Operations and Budget

Discussion and/or action on Amendments to Chapter 5 Job Classification & Compensation, Section 13 Clothing and Equipment Allowance and Chapter 10 Behavior & Conduct, Section 01 Appearance of the Employee Personnel Policies and Procedures Handbook

discussions.body: The committee was scheduled to acknowledge the May 2026 financial report for all funds. The Finance Director's recommendation indicated the village was expected to review the financial position for the period ending May 31, 2026, which showed general fund revenue at 72.9% of budget and expenditures at 44.1% of budget.

discussions.item: TIF 1 and TIF 2 Detail Reports for May
discussions.body: The committee was set to review tax increment financing reports for the two active tax increment districts. These reports were expected to provide detailed financial information about TIF fund status and performance for May 2026.

The committee was scheduled to acknowledge legal department reports and activities for May 2026. This item was expected to provide information about legal matters handled by or affecting the village during the reporting period.

discussions.item: Discussion on Finance Department Operations and Budget
discussions.body: The committee was set to discuss the operations and budget of the Finance Department. This educational presentation was expected to cover departmental activities, budget performance, and operational matters similar to the Clerk's Department presentation conducted at the May 18, 2026 meeting.

discussions.item: Discussion and/or action on Amendments to Chapter 5 Job Classification & Compensation, Section 13 Clothing and Equipment Allowance and Chapter 10 Behavior & Conduct, Section 01 Appearance of the Employee Personnel Policies and Procedures Handbook
discussions.body: The committee was scheduled to discuss and potentially take action on proposed amendments to village personnel policies regarding employee clothing and equipment allowances and appearance standards. The agenda indicated this item could result in committee action on the proposed policy changes.

actionItems: Expected to approve minutes from May 18, 2026 meeting
Scheduled to acknowledge May 2026 financial report for all funds
Scheduled to acknowledge TIF 1 and TIF 2 detail reports for May
Scheduled to acknowledge legal details for May
Scheduled to discuss Finance Department operations and budget
Expected to consider amendments to personnel policies regarding clothing and equipment allowance and employee appearance standards
title: Finance and Human Resources Committee - 6/15/2026
